name: BookLens1
tagline: AI-powered book discovery using image recognition
description: BookLens is a smart book search application that scans a book title using image recognition or text input and instantly finds matching listings across online marketplaces. It eliminates manual searching and provides direct purchase links.
problem_solved: Users often struggle to manually search books across multiple platforms. BookLens automates discovery and comparison in seconds.
core_features: Book title detection via OCR or manual input

name: YouTubePlaylistToPDF Bot
tagline: Telegram bot that converts YouTube playlists into structured PDFs
description: A Telegram bot that accepts a YouTube playlist or channel link and generates a structured PDF containing video titles and organized content for offline reference.
problem_solved: Users cannot easily archive or organize YouTube playlists into offline readable formats. This bot converts dynamic playlist data into portable documentation.

name: UddanPrice Tracker
tagline: Automated flight price drop monitoring system
description: UddanPrice Tracker monitors flight prices and alerts users when a price drop occurs. It calculates the difference in price and provides multiple notification options including direct booking links.
problem_solved: Flight prices fluctuate unpredictably, making manual tracking inefficient. This system automates monitoring and notifies users instantly.

name: Personal Portfolio
tagline: Interactive full-stack developer portfolio with blog and AI chatbot
description: A modern MERN-based portfolio website featuring dynamic certificate management, blog functionality, admin-controlled content updates, and an AI-powered chatbot assistant.
problem_solved: Traditional portfolios are static and lack interaction. This portfolio provides dynamic content management and conversational engagement.

name: RentPe
description: RentPe is a scalable rental management system designed to simplify property listing, tenant management, and payment tracking. Built with a strong backend architecture for real-world scalability.
problem_solved: Rental management is often fragmented and manual. RentPe aims to centralize listings, tenant communication, and payment workflows into a single system.
